description: Scenario database for game simulation with various game modes and mechanics

Fixed-Field Skirmish FFA.description: Free-for-all battle with pre-deployed units, every player fights individually until only one survives

Fixed-Field Skirmish Team.description: Team battle with pre-deployed units, multiple teams with allied players cooperate to annihilate enemy teams

Multi-Front Defense.description: Defend buildings at the center of the map from enemies attacking from all directions for a certain period of time

Siege Planning.description: Destroy target buildings by breaking through enemy defenses within the time limit

Time-Phased Production.description: Construct a target building within the time limit while defending against enemies with limited resources
